subcodes.title: Words to newspaper reporters, spoken on 1912-04-11
subcodes.first_line: The proper spirit in which to visit places hallowed by remembrances of Christ... To be a Bahai simply means to love all the world; to love humanity and try to serve it; to work for universal peace and universal brotherhood…. The world in the past has been ruled by force
subcodes.subjects: @role and station of women, @humor; jokes, @equality of men and women, @education of children; moral education, @universal peace; world unity, @travels to the West by Abdu'l-Baha, @unity; oneness of humanity, @freedom of thought and action
